name: Eternl
description_short: Power-user wallet for browser and mobile.
description_long: Feature-rich Cardano light wallet for browser and mobile. Favored by experienced users for power features the community has requested most.

products.name: Eternl Web App

products.name: Eternl Browser Extension

products.name: Eternl Mobile (iOS & Android)
products.description: Mobile Cardano wallet with DApp browser for iOS and Android.

products.name: Monster Swap
